archetypes.name: turing evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: turing signal changes while college context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: college boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: college handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: sells regression harness
archetypes.trigger: sells behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: based operator packet
archetypes.trigger: based output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
